items.title: Overview and Perspectives of Funding for Combinatorial Target Drugs by the National Natural Science Foundation of China
items.title_zh: 国家自然科学基金委组合靶点药物资助概况与展望
items.summary: In March 2025，the Department of Health Sciences in the National Natural Science Foundation of China （NSFC） held the 399 th Shuangqing Forum themed “Combinatorial Targets and Innovative Drugs”，which provided solid theoretical support for the forward-looking layout of basic research on combinatorial target drugs. This paper systematically analyzes the application and funding status of NSFC for combinatorial target drug research in Materia Medica （H34） and Pharmacology （H35） from 2015 to 2024. Both the number of funded projects and the total funding amount have increased steadily over the past decade. Research mainly focuses on drug combination therapy，multi-component drugs，and single-component multi-target drugs for complex diseases including malignant tumors，infectious diseases，neuropsychiatric disorders，and cardiovascular and cerebrovascular diseases，concentrating in pharmaceutics，synth…
items.title_en: Overview and Perspectives of Funding for Combinatorial Target Drugs by the National Natural Science Foundation of China
items.title_bilingual: 国家自然科学基金委组合靶点药物资助概况与展望 / Overview and Perspectives of Funding for Combinatorial Target Drugs by the National Natural Science Foundation of China
items.summary_zh: 2025年3月，国家自然科学基金委健康科学部举办第399届双清论坛，主题为“组合靶点与创新药物”，为组合靶点药物基础研究的前瞻性布局提供了坚实的理论支撑。本文系统分析了2015年至2024年国家自然科学基金委员会在《药物》（H34）和《药理学》（H35）领域组合靶点药物研究的申请和资助状况。近十年来，资助项目数量和资助总额均稳步增长。研究方向主要针对恶性肿瘤、感染性疾病、神经精神疾病、心脑血管疾病等复杂疾病的药物联合治疗、多成分药物、单成分多靶点药物，集中于药剂学、合成...

items.title: Emerging Paradigms for Innovative Drug Discovery：Targetome and Original Combination Drugs
items.title_zh: 创新药物发现的新兴范式：目标组和原始组合药物
items.summary: Chronic complex diseases，characterized by perturbations in multiple genes and pathways，have become a major challenge for both global health and innovative drug discovery. The conventional “single gene-single target-single drug” paradigm is increasingly facing limitations，as reflected by declining research and development efficiency，a slowdown in novel target discovery，and low rates of clinical translation. In parallel，combination treatment strategies，exemplified by cocktail therapies and fixed-dose combination products，have shown significant clinical efficacy. Coupled with advances in systems biology that have deepened our understanding of disease networks，these developments underscore the necessity and potential advantages of multi-target synergistic intervention. In light of current clinical needs and emerging trends in drug innovation，this article systematically presents a new paradi…
items.title_en: Emerging Paradigms for Innovative Drug Discovery：Targetome and Original Combination Drugs
items.title_bilingual: 创新药物发现的新兴范式：目标组和原始组合药物 / Emerging Paradigms for Innovative Drug Discovery：Targetome and Original Combination Drugs
items.summary_zh: 以多基因和通路扰动为特征的慢性复杂疾病已成为全球健康和创新药物发现的重大挑战。传统的“单基因-单靶点-单药”范式日益面临局限性，表现为研发效率下降、新靶点发现放缓、临床转化率低等。与此同时，以鸡尾酒疗法和固定剂量组合产品为代表的联合治疗策略已显示出显着的临床疗效。再加上系统生物学的进步加深了我们对疾病网络的理解，这些发展强调了多目标协同干预的必要性和潜在优势。针对当前的临床需求和药物创新的新兴趋势，本文系统地提出了一个新的范...

items.title: Quantum-sensing-enabled Chemical and Biological Metrology
items.title_zh: 量子传感化学和生物计量
items.summary: Quantum sensing is driving the chemical and biological measurements into a new era. This paper systematically introduces the underlying logic and representative systems of quantum chemical measurements. Quantum chemical measurement employs the superposition or entanglement of quantum systems—such as electrons，photons，atoms，and molecules—as probes. These probes are initialized，manipulated，and read out via optical and microwave techniques，enabling the transduction of physical-field signals generated by chemical and biological systems into precisely decodable quantum signals，and thereby allowing in situ，real-time，and high-precision measurement and imaging. This interdisciplinary direction achieves a deep integration of quantum physics，analytical chemistry，and biological physics，signifying a profound transformation of chemical metrology from classical measurements to quantum sensing.
items.title_bilingual: 量子传感化学和生物计量 / Quantum-sensing-enabled Chemical and Biological Metrology
items.summary_zh: 量子传感正在推动化学和生物测量进入新时代。本文系统介绍了量子化学测量的底层逻辑和代表性系统。量子化学测量利用电子、光子、原子和分子等量子系统的叠加或纠缠作为探针。这些探针通过光学和微波技术进行初始化、操纵和读出，能够将化学和生物系统产生的物理场信号转换为精确可解码的量子信号，从而实现原位、实时、高精度测量和成像。这一跨学科方向实现了量子物理、分析化学和生物物理的深度融合，标志着化学计量学从经典测量向量子传感的深刻转变。

items.title: Basic Research on Physical Intelligent System for Extreme Environment
items.title_zh: 极端环境物理智能系统基础研究
items.summary: Current research is expanding toward the extremely macroscopic，delving into the extremely microscopic，advancing toward extreme conditions，and making efforts in highly integrated and cross-disciplinary fields，continuously pushing the boundaries of human cognition. Focusing on the development needs of major equipment for exploration in extreme environments from the deep sea，deep space，deep earth，deep cavities，and polar regions named the ‘Four Depths and One Pole’，the forum engaged in in-depth discussions on the basic research of physical intelligent system （PIS）. PISs in extreme environments need to achieve autonomous and collaborative operations under extreme conditions such as ultra-high pressure，large temperature variations，and strong interference. This involves the core content of the collaborative design of materials-structure/mechanism-function of physical intelligent structure；auto…
items.title_en: Basic Research on Physical Intelligent System for Extreme Environment
items.title_bilingual: 极端环境物理智能系统基础研究 / Basic Research on Physical Intelligent System for Extreme Environment
items.summary_zh: 当前的研究正在向极其宏观拓展，向极其微观深入，向极端条件推进，在高度综合性、跨学科领域发力，不断突破人类认知的边界。论坛围绕深海、深空、地球深部、深空洞、“四深一极”极地极端环境探测重大装备发展需求，就物理智能系统（PIS）基础研究进行深入探讨。极端环境下的PIS需要在超高压、大温差、强干扰等极端条件下实现自主协同运行。这涉及物理智能结构的材料-结构/机制-功能协同设计的核心内容；汽车…

items.title: Fundamental Scientific Questions in the Institutional Mechanisms of the Five Key Areas of Finance
items.title_zh: 金融五个重点领域体制机制的基本科学问题
items.summary: The 2023 Central Financial Work Conference highlighted the importance of five key areas of finance—technology finance，green finance，inclusive finance，pension finance，and digital finance—as the core components of building a strong financial system. At its essence，finance functions as a market mechanism. Advancing these five key areas requires moving beyond the traditional “risk-return” paradigm and innovatively designing mechanisms that endogenize the social functions of financial services，thereby incorporating social benefits such as technological innovation，green development，and common prosperity into the institutional framework. This paper，drawing on major national priorities and the frontiers of academic research，proposes the basic principles and a preliminary theoretical framework for institutional development in these five areas. It systematically reviews the practical challenges a…
items.title_en: Fundamental Scientific Questions in the Institutional Mechanisms of the Five Key Areas of Finance
items.title_bilingual: 金融五个重点领域体制机制的基本科学问题 / Fundamental Scientific Questions in the Institutional Mechanisms of the Five Key Areas of Finance
items.summary_zh: 2023年中央金融工作会议强调科技金融、绿色金融、普惠金融、养老金融、数字金融五个重点金融领域作为构建坚强金融体系的核心组成部分。从本质上讲，金融是一种市场机制。推进这五个重点领域，需要超越传统的“风险回报”范式，创新设计金融服务社会功能内生化的机制，将科技创新、绿色发展、共同富裕等社会效益纳入制度框架。本文结合国家重大优先事项和学术研究前沿，提出了这五个领域制度建设的基本原则和初步理论框架。它系统地回顾了实际挑战……

items.title: From Rational Design to Clinical Translation：Current Status and Future Perspectives of Multi-target Small-molecule Drugs
items.title_zh: 从理性设计到临床转化：多靶点小分子药物的现状与未来展望
items.summary: Complex diseases are often driven by aberrations in multi-level and multi-pathway molecular networks. Consequently，traditional drug discovery paradigms centered on single targets have increasingly revealed limitations in terms of durable efficacy and resistance control. In this context，multi-target single-molecule drugs capable of simultaneously modulating multiple key pathological nodes have emerged as a promising strategy in innovative drug development，owing to their intrinsic synergistic potential and advantages in systems-level intervention. With rapid advances in molecular biology，systems pharmacology，and computational chemistry，the conceptual framework for multi-target drug design has evolved from empirical discovery toward mechanism-guided，data-integrated rational design. This review systematically summarizes the design strategies，technological advances，and current clinical appli…
items.title_en: From Rational Design to Clinical Translation：Current Status and Future Perspectives of Multi-target Small-molecule Drugs
items.title_bilingual: 从理性设计到临床转化：多靶点小分子药物的现状与未来展望 / From Rational Design to Clinical Translation：Current Status and Future Perspectives of Multi-target Small-molecule Drugs
items.summary_zh: 复杂疾病通常是由多层次、多途径分子网络的畸变引起的。因此，以单一靶点为中心的传统药物发现范式越来越暴露出持久疗效和耐药性控制方面的局限性。在此背景下，能够同时调节多个关键病理节点的多靶点单分子药物因其内在的协同潜力和系统级干预的优势而成为创新药物开发的一种有前景的策略。随着分子生物学、系统药理学和计算化学的快速发展，多靶点药物设计的概念框架已经从经验发现发展到机制引导、数据集成的理性设计。该综述系统总结了该技术的设计策略、技术进展以及目前的临床应用……

items.title: Insights and Practice in the Development of Naturally-derived Multi-target Combination Drugs
items.title_zh: 天然来源多靶点组合药物开发的见解与实践
items.summary: Natural medicines，embodying millennia of clinical practice，represent one of the key strategic resources for addressing major health challenges. Natural product-derived therapeutics，particularly Traditional Chinese Medicine formulas，exhibit distinct advantages in the prevention and treatment of chronic complex diseases owing to their multi-component，multi-target，and multi-process regulatory features，and thus hold substantial promise for establishing new therapeutic systems for chronic complex diseases. Leveraging China’s abundant natural medicinal resources，the systematic development of a theoretical and technological framework with indigenous characteristics is of major strategic importance for the future of the national biopharmaceutical industry. In this context，this article focuses on the development of natural product-derived multi-target combination drugs and discusses their princi…
items.title_en: Insights and Practice in the Development of Naturally-derived Multi-target Combination Drugs
items.title_bilingual: 天然来源多靶点组合药物开发的见解与实践 / Insights and Practice in the Development of Naturally-derived Multi-target Combination Drugs
items.summary_zh: 天然药物蕴含了数千年的临床实践，是应对重大健康挑战的关键战略资源之一。天然产物疗法尤其是中药方剂以其多成分、多靶点、多过程的调控特点，在慢性复杂疾病的预防和治疗中表现出独特的优势，为建立慢性复杂疾病的治疗新体系提供了广阔的前景。依托我国丰富的天然药用资源，系统发展具有本土特色的理论和技术框架，对民族生物医药产业的未来具有重大战略意义。在此背景下，本文重点关注天然产物衍生的多靶点联合药物的开发并探讨其原理...

items.title: Targeting Complexity：Scientific Foundation and Frontiers of Multi-target Drug Discovery
items.title_zh: 靶向复杂性：多靶点药物发现的科学基础与前沿
items.summary: In recent years，multi-target drugs have emerged as an innovative strategy to address the multifactorial pathological mechanisms of complex diseases，representing a promising direction for precision medicine. This review systematically traces the evolution of multi-target drug discovery，from early serendipitous findings to contemporary rational design approaches. It highlights representative advances in the fields of oncology，metabolic disorders，and neuropsychiatric diseases，with a focus on the molecular basis of target synergy，logical principles for target combination selection，and the integrated application of artificial intelligence （AI） and structural biology in drug design. Building on these developments，we further analyze key scientific challenges that remain to be overcome，including accurate prediction of target interactions，optimization of drug-likeness and selectivity，identificat…
items.title_en: Targeting Complexity：Scientific Foundation and Frontiers of Multi-target Drug Discovery
items.title_bilingual: 靶向复杂性：多靶点药物发现的科学基础与前沿 / Targeting Complexity：Scientific Foundation and Frontiers of Multi-target Drug Discovery
items.summary_zh: 近年来，多靶点药物作为解决复杂疾病多因素病理机制的创新策略而兴起，代表了精准医疗的一个有前景的方向。这篇综述系统地追溯了多靶点药物发现的演变，从早期的偶然发现到当代的理性设计方法。重点介绍肿瘤学、代谢紊乱和神经精神疾病领域的代表性进展，重点关注靶点协同作用的分子基础、靶点组合选择的逻辑原理以及人工智能（AI）和结构生物学在药物设计中的综合应用。基于这些进展，我们进一步分析了仍有待克服的关键科学挑战，包括准确预测靶点相互作用、药物相似性和选择性的优化、识别……

items.title: Progress and Prospects of Combined Targets in Macromolecular Drugs
items.title_zh: 大分子药物联合靶点研究进展与展望
items.summary: Bispecific antibodies with combined targets can recognize two or more epitopes on the same or different targets. This field has undergone a gradual evolution from initial attention to bispecific antibodies to the approval of BiTE （bispecific T-cell engager） therapy by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration （FDA），achieving significant progress over the past two decades. Owing to advancements in protein engineering technologies and great efforts in preclinical research，bispecific antibodies have been continuously developed and optimized to improve their efficacy and to reduce toxicity. This article focuses on the current development challenges，potential solutions，and future directions of bispecific antibodies in anticancer therapy.
items.title_en: Progress and Prospects of Combined Targets in Macromolecular Drugs
items.title_bilingual: 大分子药物联合靶点研究进展与展望 / Progress and Prospects of Combined Targets in Macromolecular Drugs
items.summary_zh: 具有组合靶标的双特异性抗体可以识别相同或不同靶标上的两个或多个表位。该领域经历了从最初关注双特异性抗体到美国食品药品监督管理局（FDA）批准BiTE（双特异性T细胞接合器）疗法的逐步演变，在过去的二十年中取得了显着的进展。由于蛋白质工程技术的进步和临床前研究的努力，双特异性抗体不断被开发和优化，以提高其功效并降低毒性。本文重点讨论双特异性抗体在抗癌治疗中当前的发展挑战、潜在的解决方案和未来方向。

items.title: Current Status and Prospects of Combination Drug and Its Artificial Intelligence Algorithm Development
items.title_zh: 组合药物及其人工智能算法发展的现状与前景
items.summary: Traditional single-target，single-molecule therapies have shown clear limitations in the treatment of complex diseases，often yielding insufficient efficacy and rapid resistance. Increasing evidence indicates that such diseases are driven by the coordinated dysregulation of multiple signaling pathways，making combination strategies an essential approach. Clinically，rationally designed combinations have demonstrated significant benefits：Dual BRAF/EGFR inhibition enhances objective response rates through synthetic lethality，SHP2/MEK co-inhibition overcomes KRAS mutation—driven resistance，and PD1/CTLA4 blockade markedly prolongs survival in metastatic melanoma. Advances in artificial intelligence （AI） are accelerating combination drug discovery. Leveraging large-scale databases such as DrugComb，predictive models like XGBoost achieve high accuracy （AUROC 0.83 across 22 000 samples），while syste…
items.title_en: Current Status and Prospects of Combination Drug and Its Artificial Intelligence Algorithm Development
items.title_bilingual: 组合药物及其人工智能算法发展的现状与前景 / Current Status and Prospects of Combination Drug and Its Artificial Intelligence Algorithm Development
items.summary_zh: 传统的单靶点、单分子疗法在治疗复杂疾病时表现出明显的局限性，往往疗效不足且耐药迅速。越来越多的证据表明，此类疾病是由多种信号通路的协调失调引起的，因此组合策略成为一种重要的方法。临床上，合理设计的组合已显示出显着的益处：BRAF/EGFR双重抑制通过合成致死率提高客观缓解率，SHP2/MEK共同抑制克服KRAS突变驱动的耐药性，PD1/CTLA4阻断显着延长转移性黑色素瘤的生存期。人工智能（AI）的进步正在加速组合药物的发现。利用 DrugComb 等大型数据库，XGBoost 等预测模型实现了高精度（AUROC 0.83，跨 22 000 个样本），同时系统…

items.title: 关于公布2026年度国家自然科学基金项目申请初审结果的通告 04-29
items.title_zh: 关于公布2026年度国家自然科学基金项目申请初审结果的通告 04-29

items.title: Prospects for Combination Drug Development in Central Nervous System Disorders：From Multi-target Synergy to Personalized Precision Therapy
items.title_zh: 中枢神经系统疾病联合用药发展前景：从多靶点协同到个体化精准治疗
items.summary: The development of therapeutics for central nervous system （CNS） disorders is markedly lagging behind other disease areas，characterized by an exceptionally high failure rate in late-stage clinical trials. This review addresses the central challenge of creating effective combination therapies for complex CNS diseases，where single-target agents often fall short. We propose a shift from traditional empirical methods towards a rational design paradigm and explore three key enabling strategies. First，we discuss modernizing Traditional Chinese Medicine （TCM） formulations by applying multi-omics and artificial intelligence to deconvolute their multi-component，multi-target mechanisms，thus transforming them into a source for rational drug combination discovery. Second，we highlight the role of stimuli-responsive nanocarriers in achieving spatiotemporally controlled drug delivery，which allows for…
items.title_en: Prospects for Combination Drug Development in Central Nervous System Disorders：From Multi-target Synergy to Personalized Precision Therapy
items.title_bilingual: 中枢神经系统疾病联合用药发展前景：从多靶点协同到个体化精准治疗 / Prospects for Combination Drug Development in Central Nervous System Disorders：From Multi-target Synergy to Personalized Precision Therapy
items.summary_zh: 中枢神经系统（CNS）疾病治疗方法的发展明显落后于其他疾病领域，其特点是后期临床试验失败率极高。这篇综述解决了为复杂的中枢神经系统疾病创造有效的联合疗法的核心挑战，而单靶点药物往往无法满足这些疾病的需要。我们提出从传统的经验方法转向理性设计范式，并探索三个关键的支持策略。首先，我们讨论通过应用多组学和人工智能来解析中药制剂的多成分、多靶点机制，从而将其转化为合理药物组合发现的源泉，从而实现中药制剂的现代化。其次，我们强调刺激响应纳米载体在实现时空控制药物输送中的作用，这使得……

items.title: Focusing on the Targetome of Chronic Diseases to Foster New Paradigms in Innovative Drug Discovery
items.title_zh: 聚焦慢性病靶点，培育创新药物发现新范式
items.title_en: Focusing on the Targetome of Chronic Diseases to Foster New Paradigms in Innovative Drug Discovery
items.title_bilingual: 聚焦慢性病靶点，培育创新药物发现新范式 / Focusing on the Targetome of Chronic Diseases to Foster New Paradigms in Innovative Drug Discovery

items.title: Current Status and Future Perspectives on Multi-target Drugs Development in Cardiovascular Diseases
items.title_zh: 心血管疾病多靶点药物开发现状及未来展望
items.summary: The incidence and mortality of cardiovascular diseases （CVD） in China continue to rise，and the turning point has not yet arrived. The development of medicine has to some extent improved the prognosis of CVD patients. How to reduce the residual risk of cardiovascular diseases in the Chinese population and further reduce the terminal events，and improve the survival rate of cardiovascular diseases among Chinese people is the main problem currently faced by the research and development of cardiovascular disease drugs. The mechanism of cardiovascular diseases is complex，and there is often a lack of a single core target. The combination target drug intervention strategy achieves “increasing efficacy and reducing toxicity” and improving drug resistance by balancing the regulation of multiple targets，and has a good application prospect. This article reviews the principles for target selection，l…
items.title_en: Current Status and Future Perspectives on Multi-target Drugs Development in Cardiovascular Diseases
items.title_bilingual: 心血管疾病多靶点药物开发现状及未来展望 / Current Status and Future Perspectives on Multi-target Drugs Development in Cardiovascular Diseases
items.summary_zh: 我国心血管疾病（CVD）发病率和死亡率持续上升，拐点尚未到来。医学的发展在一定程度上改善了CVD患者的预后。如何降低中国人群心血管疾病的残余风险，进一步减少终末事件，提高中国人群心血管疾病的生存率，是当前心血管疾病药物研发面临的主要问题。心血管疾病的发病机制复杂，往往缺乏单一的核心靶点。联合靶点药物干预策略通过平衡多靶点调控实现“增效减毒”和改善耐药性，具有良好的应用前景。本文回顾了目标选择的原则，l...

items.title: Applications of Artificial Intelligence in Drug Target Discovery
items.title_zh: 人工智能在药物靶点发现中的应用
items.summary: Target discovery，a core step in drug development，is currently facing a dual bottleneck. Current research efforts remain highly concentrated on a small number of validated targets，resulting in serious homogeneity across drug pipelines. At the same time，traditional experimental and computational approaches are limited in throughput，precision，and their capacity to identify multiple targets in complex and refractory diseases. To overcome these challenges，artificial intelligence （AI） is now transforming this landscape. Natural language processing enables large-scale knowledge mining from biomedical literature，while the deep integration of multi-omics and multimodal datasets broadens biological insights. Convolutional neural networks extract features from bioimaging，and graph neural networks capture the complexity of molecular interaction networks. Together，these advances greatly accelerate t…
items.title_en: Applications of Artificial Intelligence in Drug Target Discovery
items.title_bilingual: 人工智能在药物靶点发现中的应用 / Applications of Artificial Intelligence in Drug Target Discovery
items.summary_zh: 靶点发现作为药物研发的核心步骤，目前面临着双重瓶颈。目前的研究工作仍然高度集中在少数经过验证的靶标上，导致整个药物管道存在严重的同质性。与此同时，传统的实验和计算方法在通量、精度以及识别复杂和难治性疾病中多个靶点的能力方面受到限制。为了克服这些挑战，人工智能（AI）正在改变这一格局。自然语言处理能够从生物医学文献中进行大规模知识挖掘，而多组学和多模态数据集的深度集成拓宽了生物学见解。卷积神经网络从生物成像中提取特征，图神经网络捕获分子相互作用网络的复杂性。总之，这些进步极大地加速了……

items.title: From Single-target to System Remodeling：Combination Therapeutic Strategies for Metabolic Diseases
items.title_zh: 从单一靶点到系统重塑：代谢性疾病的联合治疗策略
items.summary: Metabolic diseases are characterized by complex pathological features involving multi-organ dysfunction and multi-pathway dysregulation. Therapeutic strategies targeting a single biomarker or pathway have shown limited effectiveness in halting disease progression. Taking type 2 diabetes mellitus （T2DM） as an example，the coexistence of hyperglycemia，insulin resistance，lipid metabolism disorders，and chronic inflammation leads to simultaneous damage across key systems such as the β-cell，liver，heart，and kidneys. However，current treatments primarily focus on glycemic control and lack systemic interventions that address multi-organ pathologies，resulting in persistently high rates of complications. Against this backdrop，a paradigm shift is underway—from reductionist，single-target approaches to integrated，systems-level therapeutic strategies. Combination drug development lies at the heart of th…
items.title_en: From Single-target to System Remodeling：Combination Therapeutic Strategies for Metabolic Diseases
items.title_bilingual: 从单一靶点到系统重塑：代谢性疾病的联合治疗策略 / From Single-target to System Remodeling：Combination Therapeutic Strategies for Metabolic Diseases
items.summary_zh: 代谢性疾病具有复杂的病理特征，涉及多器官功能障碍和多途径失调。针对单一生物标志物或途径的治疗策略在阻止疾病进展方面效果有限。以2型糖尿病（T2DM）为例，高血糖、胰岛素抵抗、脂质代谢紊乱和慢性炎症并存，导致β细胞、肝、心、肾等关键系统同时受损。然而，目前的治疗主要集中在血糖控制上，缺乏解决多器官病理的系统干预措施，导致并发症发生率持续居高不下。在此背景下，范式转变正在发生——从还原论、单一目标方法到综合、系统级治疗策略。组合药物开发是…的核心

items.title: Identification of Combinatorial Targets for Anticancer Drug Discovery
items.title_zh: 抗癌药物发现的组合靶标的鉴定
items.summary: The past decades have witnessed remarkable conceptual advancements in cancer therapy, which have catalyzed the approval of numerous new therapies and delivered significant benefits to cancer patients. Nevertheless，most malignant cancers still lack effective treatment options. Currently，with a deeper understanding of cancer pathology and the emergence of cutting-edge therapeutic interventions，we may have come to a crossroads to revisit the strategies for cancer therapy. This article highlights the importance of combinatorial targets not only in addressing the intrinsic complexity of cancer but also in stimulating innovation and strengthening the competitive edge of the biomedicine industry in China. We further summarize potential approaches to identify combinatorial targets and propose future directions that could facilitate new breakthroughs in this area. With this，we hope to provide ne…
items.title_en: Identification of Combinatorial Targets for Anticancer Drug Discovery
items.title_bilingual: 抗癌药物发现的组合靶标的鉴定 / Identification of Combinatorial Targets for Anticancer Drug Discovery
items.summary_zh: 在过去的几十年里，癌症治疗的概念取得了显着的进步，这促进了许多新疗法的批准，并为癌症患者带来了显着的益处。尽管如此，大多数恶性肿瘤仍然缺乏有效的治疗方案。目前，随着对癌症病理学的深入了解和尖端治疗干预措施的出现，我们可能已经走到了重新审视癌症治疗策略的十字路口。本文强调了组合靶标的重要性，不仅在解决癌症的内在复杂性方面，而且在刺激创新和增强中国生物医药行业的竞争优势方面也具有重要意义。我们进一步总结了确定组合目标的潜在方法，并提出了可以促进该领域新突破的未来方向。借此，我们希望能提供新的…

items.title: Key Scientific Issues and Technological Bottlenecks in the Applications of Organic Optoelectronic Materials
items.title_zh: 有机光电材料应用的关键科学问题和技术瓶颈
items.summary: Organic/polymeric optoelectronic materials have always been a key research focus，strongly supported as part of national strategic initiatives and recognized as crucial electronic materials. It is also a research and application field where China is expected to achieve international leadership. Based on the 388 th “Shuangqing Forum” organized by the National Natural Science Foundation of China，this paper focuses on several key scientific issues and technological bottlenecks encountered in the application of organic optoelectronic materials，including the contradiction between energy-level alignment and device performance，the challenges in regulating charge carrier transport and recombination processes，as well as material degradation and device failure. It summarizes and refines the fundamental scientific problems limiting the practical application of organic/polymeric optoelectronic mater…
items.title_en: Key Scientific Issues and Technological Bottlenecks in the Applications of Organic Optoelectronic Materials
items.title_bilingual: 有机光电材料应用的关键科学问题和技术瓶颈 / Key Scientific Issues and Technological Bottlenecks in the Applications of Organic Optoelectronic Materials
items.summary_zh: 有机/高分子光电材料一直是国家战略重点支持的重点研究领域，被认为是重要的电子材料。这也是中国有望取得国际领先地位的研究和应用领域。本文以国家自然科学基金委组织的第388届“双清论坛”为契机，重点研究了有机光电材料应用中遇到的几个关键科学问题和技术瓶颈，包括能级配向与器件性能之间的矛盾、载流子输运与复合过程调控的挑战以及材料降解与器件失效等。它总结和提炼了限制有机/聚合物光电材料实际应用的基本科学问题……

items.title: Strategic Recommendations for Integrating LNG Cold Energy Utilisation Technology with Clean Energy Systems
items.title_zh: LNG冷能利用技术与清洁能源系统融合的战略建议
items.summary: Promoting LNG cold energy utilization technology and building a multi energy complementary，clean，low-carbon，safe and efficient energy system are an important direction for the development of modern energy systems. This paper investigates and analyses the development status and trend of LNG cold energy utilization at home and abroad，focusing on the high-quality development layout of LNG cold energy utilization technology and clean energy system integration. Through energy matching and integration methods combined with economic and technical feasibility evaluation，this paper summarizes typical cases of LNG cold energy cascade utilization and multi-energy integrated utilization. The complementarity of LNG cold energy with conventional energy sources and renewable energies such as wind，solar and geothermal power has been analysed，along with the integrated utilisation of LNG cold energy in t…
items.title_en: Strategic Recommendations for Integrating LNG Cold Energy Utilisation Technology with Clean Energy Systems
items.title_bilingual: LNG冷能利用技术与清洁能源系统融合的战略建议 / Strategic Recommendations for Integrating LNG Cold Energy Utilisation Technology with Clean Energy Systems
items.summary_zh: 推广LNG冷能利用技术，构建多能源互补、清洁低碳、安全高效的能源体系，是现代能源系统发展的重要方向。本文调查分析了国内外LNG冷能利用的发展现状和趋势，重点探讨了LNG冷能利用技术和清洁能源系统集成的高质量发展布局。通过能源匹配与整合方法结合经济技术可行性评价，总结了LNG冷能梯级利用和多能综合利用的典型案例。分析了LNG冷能与常规能源以及风能、太阳能、地热能等可再生能源的互补性，以及LNG冷能在能源领域的综合利用。

items.title: 香山科学会议第797次：国家航空应急救援体系现代化建设的思考
items.title_zh: 香山科学会议第797次：国家航空应急救援体系现代化建设的思考
items.summary: 会议动态：这条记录的是“国家航空应急救援体系现代化建设的思考”这场香山会议的背景和核心问题。——香山科学会议第797次学术讨论会 习近平总书记强调，要“加强应急管理体系和能力建设”“加强航空应急救援能力建设，完善应急救援空域保障机制”，这些重要指示为我国应急管理体系和能力现代化建设提供了根本遵循，指明了前进方向。2024年3月，低空经济被首次写入政府工作报告，党的二十届三中全会明确对发展低空经济提出要求。航空应急救援反映了国家应对非传统安全威胁的响应速度，是“安邦惠民”和国家安全战略的重要支点，其产业链涵盖的38个细分领域能够带动相关产业快速发展。航空应急救援与低空经济的协调发展，可以有效推动社会治理向…

items.source: 香山科学会议 · 会议动态
items.title: 香山科学会议第796次：亚热带农业高质量发展的核心科学和技术问题
items.title_zh: 香山科学会议第796次：亚热带农业高质量发展的核心科学和技术问题
items.summary: 会议动态：这条记录的是“亚热带农业高质量发展的核心科学和技术问题”这场香山会议的背景和核心问题。—— 香山科学会议第 796 次学术讨论会 我国亚热带地区涉及 16 个省市（含台湾省），面积约占全国国土面积的 1/4 ，人口约占全国总人口的一半。该区域光热水资源丰富、雨热同期，是我国传统优势农业主产区，粮食作物产量约占 41% （稻谷占比 60% 以上），猪牛羊肉占比 53% ，更是油料、蔬果茶、淡水产品主产区。但从 90 年代开始，我国南方省份粮食生产地位逐步下降，进入 “ 北粮南调 ” 时代。由于水资源限制和环境压力，我国北方粮食生产潜力有限且气候不稳定性加剧，尤其在当前国际粮食危机加剧的形势下，应重新…

items.source: 香山科学会议 · 会议动态
items.title: 香山科学会议第Y12次：人工智能驱动绿色低碳水处理中的关键核心问题
items.title_zh: 香山科学会议第Y12次：人工智能驱动绿色低碳水处理中的关键核心问题
items.summary: 会议动态：这条记录的是“人工智能驱动绿色低碳水处理中的关键核心问题”这场香山会议的背景和核心问题。——香山科学会议第Y12次学术讨论会 我国水资源匮乏，人均水资源量仅为世界均值 1/4 。海水淡化与污水处理回用是缓解水危机的核心途径。在碳中和的宏观战略下，水处理行业的绿色低碳转型不仅是必然选择，更是实现可持续发展的战略要地与重要路径。单一材料创新难降成本，须融合过程与系统设计。传统“试错法”研发效率低，迫切需要构建融合宏观多物理场模型与微观机理的智能平台，实现材料 - 组件 - 工艺多尺度协同优化，突破下一代水处理技术瓶颈，驱动行业绿色转型。人工智能（ AI ）技术通过优化能效、降低碳排放，正成为解决水处理核…

items.source: 香山科学会议 · 会议动态
items.title: 香山科学会议第793次：化学、医药和材料中的关键问题：不饱和碳单元的功能、构建与应用
items.title_zh: 香山科学会议第793次：化学、医药和材料中的关键问题：不饱和碳单元的功能、构建与应用
items.summary: 会议动态：这条记录的是“化学、医药和材料中的关键问题：不饱和碳单元的功能、构建与应用”这场香山会议的背景和核心问题。——香山科学会议第 793 次学术讨论会 不饱和碳单元是烯烃、炔烃等的统称，是一大类最基础 、最广泛 使用 的 有机分子之一，同时其作为核心结构单元也 广泛 存在于活性药物分子 、 天然产物和材料分子中。烯烃和炔烃等是煤和石油化工的重要产品，是有机合成中最重要的基础原料之一，被广泛地应用于精细化工、医药、能源及材料等领域，影响着人们的生产生活。经过三十几年的努力，累积烯烃化学得到了长足的发展，虽然还有诸多挑战，其合成及其转化已成为合成科学相关领域的重要组成部分。另外烯炔、共轭双烯等方面的研究也引起了人们广泛的兴趣…

items.source: 香山科学会议 · 会议动态
items.title: 香山科学会议第790次：海洋药物发展科学问题与技术创新
items.title_zh: 香山科学会议第790次：海洋药物发展科学问题与技术创新
items.summary: 会议动态：这条记录的是“海洋药物发展科学问题与技术创新”这场香山会议的背景和核心问题。—— 香山科学会议第 790 次学术讨论会 海洋是生命之源，其特殊生境孕育的药用生物资源，在物种多样性、基因特异性、天然产物丰富度及生物活性上具不可替代战略价值，是保障人类健康的“蓝色宝库”，开发潜力大、应用前景广，是全球海洋强国战略布局核心资源之一。当前，全球已上市 20 余个海洋药物，在抗肿瘤、抗菌抗病毒、抗心脑血管疾病等多领域实现临床应用。我国海洋糖类药物开发国际领先，“蓝色药库”开发计划已呈现“聚集开发，梯次产出”良好态势。然而，受 陆地资源开发 趋近饱和影响 ， 全球海洋强国 加速布局，《 BBNJ 协…

items.source: 香山科学会议 · 会议动态
items.title: 香山科学会议第789次：“信息器件原子级制造实验装置”关键科学技术问题
items.title_zh: 香山科学会议第789次：“信息器件原子级制造实验装置”关键科学技术问题
items.summary: 会议动态：这条记录的是““信息器件原子级制造实验装置”关键科学技术问题”这场香山会议的背景和核心问题。—— 香山科学会议第 789 次学术讨论会 原子级制造的内涵是通过对原子的规模化精准操控，以能量作用于原子或原子级基元，制造出逼近理论极限性能功能产品的变革性制造技术。以集成电路芯片和量子计算芯片为代表的信息器件原子级制造技术是当前国际主要大国竞相布局的战略高地，亦是大国竞争的焦点，是保障我国集成电路、量子科技、人工智能等领域处于国际领先地位的根技术。原子级制造将 开启以原子精准操控为核心的 信息器件制造 颠覆性技术体系， 助力我国从制造大国迈向“制造强国”，实现 2035 “科技强国”战略目标 。 为系统 研判…

items.source: 香山科学会议 · 会议动态
items.title: 香山科学会议第S75次：中国–新西兰先进治疗双边学术研讨会：异种移植与细胞治疗科学前沿问题与关键技术
items.title_zh: 香山科学会议第S75次：中国–新西兰先进治疗双边学术研讨会：异种移植与细胞治疗科学前沿问题与关键技术
items.summary: 会议动态：这条记录的是“中国–新西兰先进治疗双边学术研讨会：异种移植与细胞治疗科学前沿问题与关键技术”这场香山会议的背景和核心问题。—— 香山科学会议第 S75 次学术讨论会 2025 年 6 月 24-25 日，香山科学会议在北京召开了以 “ 异种移植与细胞治疗科学前沿问题与关键技术 ” 为主题的第 S75 次学术讨论会，聘请空军军医大学第一附属医院窦科峰教授、清华大学医学院林欣教授、惠灵顿维多利亚大学费里尔研究所 Emily Parker （艾米莉 · 帕克）教授、奥塔哥大学 Peter Mace （彼得 · 麦斯）教授共同担任执行主席。来自中国和新西兰 20 余家单位的 40 余名专家学者应邀参加了会议。会议围绕（ 1 ） “ 异种移植…

items.source: 香山科学会议 · 会议动态
items.title: 香山科学会议第788次：面向低碳能源的化工过程与前沿交叉
items.title_zh: 香山科学会议第788次：面向低碳能源的化工过程与前沿交叉
items.summary: 会议动态：这条记录的是“面向低碳能源的化工过程与前沿交叉”这场香山会议的背景和核心问题。—— 香山科学会议第 788 次学术讨论会 化学工业 是 我国国民经济的支柱产业和现代化产业体系的 重要基石 ，其产业规模已连续多年居全球首位，但仍面临 工艺过程能耗物耗高、数智化水平低 、高端战略材料与工艺受制于人等瓶颈。在全球双碳战略实施 、 能源结构 转型及数智赋能技术变革 的背景下，化工产业正迎来以 “ 低碳化、智能化、高端化 ” 为特征的转型关键期，这一趋势不仅代表着行业未来发展的主流方向，更是国际化工巨头竞相布局的战略高地。 然而 ， 如何实现 化工与新能源 、人工智能的融合发展及技术变革是化学化工界…
